economic_notes: Pauquachin Legacy Trust market value of investments was $10,779,560 at year-end. COVID-19 noted as significant event with uncertain future impact. Fisheries and economic development departments active. 1239774 BC Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020. Province is BC. Consolidated entities include Social Housing and Bokecen Xaxe (Sacred) Society. 1239774 BC Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,483,240 + Province of BC $682,921 + First Nations Health Authority $632,067 + Fisheries and Oceans Canada $199,047 + CMHC $58,813 + Capacity funding $90,210 = $3,146,298. OSR includes trust income $385,111 + rental income $160,730 + other revenue $98,932 + interest income $51,285 = $696,058. Housing expenses combined Band Housing $155,603 + Social Housing $143,097 = $298,700. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text. Pauquachin Legacy Trust is an independently administered trust excluded from consolidation. COVID-19 disclosed as significant subsequent event.
